meta.title: About | Jacek Janczura
meta.description: Co-founder & CTO at Jaden Data. AI engineer and AWS cloud architect building enterprise LLM/RAG platforms and distributed systems. Available for architecture reviews, prompt engineering, and AI consulting.

hero.title: About
hero.subtitle: Building AI that works for how you actually operate

paragraphs: I'm Jacek — Co-founder & CTO of Jaden Data, based in Berlin. I design and ship enterprise AI systems: LLM platforms, RAG pipelines, event-driven microservices on AWS — all anchored to real business processes, not demo workflows.

We bootstrapped Jaden Data without external VC and grew it to €1M+ annual revenue. I scaled the engineering team from 0 to 10, led architecture and delivery for 50+ organizations, and achieved ISO 27001 and SOC 2 certification in about three months.

I also take on select consulting engagements: architecture reviews, AI/LLM/RAG delivery, prompt engineering + evals, and hands-on technical leadership. Check out the projects, publications, or grab the CV below.

philosophy.title: How I Think About AI
paragraphs: Most AI adoption fails not because the tech is bad, but because nobody mapped it to how work actually gets done. My approach is simple: AI must serve your processes, not replace them.

That means starting with operations — understanding the bottlenecks, the manual steps, the decision points — and then building systems that fit. The result: hours of manual work become minutes of automated intelligence, and teams trust the output because it matches their workflow.

career.title: Career Journey
paragraphs: At Jaden Data (2021–present), I've been building from zero: company, product, and team. Our flagship, entAIngine, is a multi-tenant SaaS platform for AI process automation — serving 50+ organizations with 99.9% uptime across manufacturing, pharma, finance, and enterprise ops. I also led projects like KnowledgeX (EU Horizon 2020 funded), Flowhive AI/VC, and Valuation Engine.

Before that, I was a Software Engineer at idealo (Axel Springer), Germany's largest price comparison portal with 18M+ monthly users. I helped ship the multi-country login rollout across 6 countries — 1.4M new accounts in 3 months (700% over forecast). Built real-time systems on Kafka, enterprise microservices in Java/Kotlin with Spring Boot, and was part of idealo's on-prem to AWS migration.

Earlier, I worked as a Blockchain Engineer at T-Labs (Deutsche Telekom Innovation Laboratories), designing and deploying Hyperledger Fabric networks for package tracking. And at SAS Institute, I was part of the founding team for one of the first real-time behavioral marketing platforms in banking — processing thousands of events per second for ING Bank, with one of the first SAS ESP implementations in the EU.
I hold a dual M.Sc. in Computer Science from TU Berlin (grade 1.3/A) and Warsaw University of Technology (grade 1.0/A, Honors Diploma), plus a B.Sc. in Electronics and Computer Engineering.

outsideWork.title: Outside Work
paragraphs: When I'm not building systems, you'll find me jumping out of planes (certified skydiver, PJ(B) license), diving (Advanced Open Water), teaching windsurfing (International Instructor certification), or snowboarding. These aren't just hobbies — the risk management, calm-under-pressure instincts, and clear teaching skills carry directly into technical leadership and crisis handling.
I speak Polish (native), English (professional/IELTS certified), and German (conversational) — which helps when working across international teams and with clients across Europe.
